themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "John Chrysostom on HOMILIES ON GENESIS 29.29: Then sacred Scripture goes on from this point t...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֔רֶץ: was the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Bede on Commentary on Genesis (Hexaemeron): Now the beginning of his kingdom was Babylon and...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
